name: Orihime
description: Cross-repository code knowledge graph MCP server for Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, and TypeScript. Indexes source code into embedded KuzuDB via tree-sitter and exposes 30+ tools for call-flow tracing, multi-hop taint analysis (OWASP/CWE/PCI/STIG reports), entry-point reachability filtering, performance hotspot detection, and license compliance — without reading source files. 95% fewer tokens vs source-reading baseline.
